positive: A whimsical celestial animal portrait featuring a stylized, mythical creature—a constellation fox (vulpine form with glowing celestial fur and star accents)—sitting amidst a cluster of stylized, oversized, bioluminescent deep-sea flora. The fox has a sleek, elegant silhouette and is surrounded by crescent moons, nebulas, and stylized constellations forming a cosmic border. Composition is highly centralized and balanced, designed for apparel printing. Use a deep midnight blue and indigo palette contrasting with vibrant neon cyan, electric magenta, and ethereal gold accents. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau linework and modern pop-sci-fi illustration, with clean vector-like edges and perfect symmetry. High contrast, crisp lines, perfect negative space.
negative: blur, noise, low contrast, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, text, watermark, signature, cropped, logo, trademark, celebrity, cartoonish, grainy
